Table and Chair Rentals in Mahone Bay NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals offers table and chair rentals for events in Mahone Bay NS. Black padded folding chairs are available at $3 each — 15 in our inventory. White folding chairs and 6 ft rectangular tables are available by request. Tables and chairs can be added to any inflatable rental, foam party, 360 Photo Booth booking, lawn games, or party package.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. We serve Mahone Bay NS and surrounding areas. Availability, quantity, delivery, and final pricing are confirmed manually based on your event date, location, and order size. A minimum rental order applies for standalone table and chair bookings.

Best For

  • Birthday parties
  • School events and fun days
  • Community events
  • Backyard parties
  • Graduations
  • Fundraisers and family events

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer table and chair rentals in Mahone Bay?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals offers table and chair rentals in Mahone Bay NS. Black padded folding chairs are available at $3 each, with 15 in our inventory. White folding chairs and 6 ft rectangular tables are available by request. Contact us to confirm availability and pricing for your event date.
Can I add tables and chairs to an inflatable or package rental?
Yes. Tables and chairs are available as add-ons with inflatable rentals, foam parties, 360 Photo Booth bookings, lawn games, and party packages. Contact us when requesting your inflatable or package to include tables and chairs.
Can I rent tables and chairs without an inflatable?
Yes. Standalone table and chair rentals are available by quote for events in Mahone Bay NS. A minimum rental order applies before travel. Contact us with your event date, location, and quantities needed.
How much do chair rentals cost near Mahone Bay?
Black padded folding chairs are $3 each. White folding chairs are available by request starting at $3 each. Final pricing is confirmed based on your order and location.
How much do table rentals cost near Mahone Bay?
6 ft rectangular tables are available by request starting at $8 each. Final pricing is confirmed based on your order and location.
Is booking confirmed after I submit the form?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Nova Kingdom Rentals confirms availability, quantity, delivery details, and pricing before your rental is finalized.
